name: Crown Island Combo
shortDescription: Tropical combo with bounce, slide, and splash/pool fun.
fullDescription: The Crown Island Combo brings tropical party energy with a bounce area, slide, and splash/pool zone. It is a strong choice for backyard birthdays, summer parties, and family events.
features: Designed for both adults and kids, up to 8 users
setupNotes: Water source required for wet use
Adult supervision required at all times
dimensions: Length: 26 ft; Width: 14 ft; Height: 14.5 ft; Seat height: 4 ft 3 in
capacity: Designed for both adults and kids, up to 8 users
specs: Capacity: designed for both adults and kids, up to 8 users

name: Crown Axe Challenge
shortDescription: Inflatable axe throwing for friendly competition.
fullDescription: Crown Axe Challenge adds a safe competitive activity to birthdays, schools, community events, and group gatherings. It works well as a standalone game or as an add-on with an inflatable rental.
features: Recommended for older kids, teens, and adults
dimensions: Width: 11.3 ft; Depth: 7.9 ft; Height: 10.2 ft

name: Crown Kick Darts
shortDescription: Giant inflatable football darts game for all ages.
fullDescription: Crown Kick Darts lets players kick soccer balls at a giant dartboard. It is simple, competitive, and fun for sports parties, schools, community events, teens, and adults.
features: Accessories may include blower, pump, ropes, stakes, repair patches, sandbags, scoreboard, marker pen, storage bag, and soccer balls
setupNotes: Accessories may vary by event setup
specs: Product dimensions: 118.1 x 144.1 x 63 in / 3000 x 3660 x 1600 mm

name: Crown Rush 42
shortDescription: Large 42ft water slide and obstacle course combo.
fullDescription: Crown Rush 42 is a large water slide and obstacle course combo built for high-energy fun. It is ideal for bigger birthdays, school events, larger yards, and community celebrations.
setupNotes: Large clear level setup area required
Water source required for wet use
Adult supervision required at all times

name: Crown Quest
shortDescription: Obstacle course attraction for bigger event energy.
fullDescription: Crown Quest is an obstacle-course style inflatable built for movement, challenge, and group fun. It is especially useful for schools, community events, festivals, and larger groups.
setupNotes: Adult supervision required at all times

name: Crown Cascade
shortDescription: Colourful water slide for splash-ready summer fun.
fullDescription: Crown Cascade is designed to bring water-slide excitement to warm-weather events. It is a great option for summer birthdays, backyard parties, and splash-ready celebrations.
setupNotes: Adult supervision required at all times

name: Crown Climber
fullDescription: Crown Climber adds a vertical challenge to events and is ideal for guests who want more than a regular bounce experience. It is a strong fit for school events, community events, and older kids.
setupNotes: Adult supervision required at all times

name: Crown Carnival Challenge
tagline: Bring the Carnival to Your Event
shortDescription: Carnival-style inflatable challenge game for all ages.
fullDescription: Crown Carnival Challenge brings a carnival-style game experience to birthdays, school events, community celebrations, and backyard parties. It works great as a standalone rental or as an add-on alongside other inflatables and packages. Add-on pricing available when booked with any package.
setupNotes: Adult supervision required at all times

name: Crown Dino Combo
tagline: Bounce Like a Dino, Rule Like a King
shortDescription: Dinosaur-themed combo inflatable with bounce and slide fun.
fullDescription: Crown Dino Combo is a colourful dinosaur-themed inflatable designed for younger kids who love bounce and slide fun. It is a great choice for dinosaur birthdays and backyard parties.
setupNotes: Adult supervision required at all times
